summary: Iteration 25 testing complete. All 18 Batch 3 admin features tested and verified. Backend: 27/27 tests passed. Frontend: All UI scenarios verified via Playwright. Key features: (1) 'Kategorie právní poradny' label correct in Content tab, (2) 'Kategorie aktualit' CRUD working (add/edit/delete), (3) News categories API endpoints fully functional, (4) Locations API endpoints working with edit button, (5) Service detail modal opens on card click with username as clickable user profile link, (6) Barvy nadpisových markerů section with 7 color pickers, (7) Marker colors save/load working, (8) Specialist form shows Lokality checkboxes (15 regions), (9) NewsPage fetches categories from /api/news-categories, (10) NearbyPage loads 15 Czech regions from /api/locations.

feature_test_results.kategorie_pravni_poradny_label: PASS - Content tab shows 'Kategorie právní poradny', NOT 'Kategorie článků'
feature_test_results.kategorie_aktualit_section: PASS - New section visible in Content tab with + button and CRUD
feature_test_results.news_cat_add: PASS - Added 'UI Test Kategorie' successfully, toast 'Přidáno'
feature_test_results.news_cat_edit: PASS - Edited to 'UI Test Kategorie Updated', toast 'Uloženo'
feature_test_results.news_cat_delete: PASS - Deleted test category, removed from list
feature_test_results.GET_news_categories: PASS - 200, returns list with id/name fields
feature_test_results.POST_admin_news_categories: PASS - Creates new category, persists in list
feature_test_results.PUT_admin_news_categories: PASS - Updates category name, change verified via GET
feature_test_results.DELETE_admin_news_categories: PASS - Removes category, verified not in list
feature_test_results.locations_edit_button: PASS - 15 pencil edit buttons found for locations, edit mode activates
feature_test_results.service_detail_modal: PASS - Click on service card opens modal 'Detail nabídky'
feature_test_results.service_detail_user_link: PASS - Username is clickable, navigates to /users/{id} profile page
feature_test_results.service_detail_fields: PASS - Modal shows Nabízí, Hledá, location badge, date, description, status
feature_test_results.barvy_nadpisovych_markeru_section: PASS - Section visible with 7 color items (Právní poradna, Aktuality, Komunita, Vzájemná podpora, Odborníci, V mém okolí, Výchozí)
feature_test_results.GET_settings_marker_colors: PASS - 200, returns dict with all 7 keys
feature_test_results.PUT_admin_settings_marker_colors: PASS - 200, colors persisted, toast 'Barvy markerů uloženy'
feature_test_results.specialist_lokality_checkboxes: PASS - 15 location checkboxes visible in specialist creation form with label 'Lokality (lze vybrat více)'
feature_test_results.news_page_categories_from_api: PASS - /api/news-categories called on mount, filter buttons show API categories
feature_test_results.nearby_page_locations_from_api: PASS - /api/locations called 4 times, 15 Czech region options in dropdown

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js fetchContent() loads 5 endpoints in parallel including news-categories - clean pattern
fetchMarkerColors() is called via Obsah tab click (line 515) - correctly separated from fetchContent
newsCategories hardcoded array at line 38-44 still exists in AdminPage.js but is not used for the dynamic section - only for newsForm default category value; not a bug
NearbyPage.js correctly uses locationOptions from /api/locations (not hardcoded) with proper useEffect at line 23-25
NewsPage.js initializes newsCats with fallback hardcoded values then overwrites from API in useEffect at line 146-148 - good UX pattern (no blank flash)
Service detail modal uses navigate() from useNavigate for user profile link - correctly closes modal on click
AdminPage.js file is 1584 lines - approaching size limit; could benefit from splitting into separate tab components in future
assigned_locations in SpecialistCreate correctly takes locations from fetchAll() (not fetchContent()) - uses main page locations state
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ news category during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified all 18 Batch 3 admin features: (1) Admin Content tab 'Obsah' renamed 'Kategorie článků' to 'Kategorie právní poradny', (2) New 'Kategorie aktualit' section with full CRUD (add/edit/delete) + edit buttons for each item, (3) GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/news-categories all working, (4) Public /api/news-categories returns categories (with fallback defaults if DB empty), (5) Location edit buttons (pencil icon) in Locations card, PUT /api/admin/locations works, (6) Admin Nabídky tab - click service card opens Dialog modal with user link (navigates to /users/{id}), offer/need/location/date/description/status/delete, (7) Admin Content tab - 'Barvy nadpisových markerů' card with 7 color items, 'Upravit' shows color pickers, save calls PUT /api/admin/settings/marker-colors, (8) Specialist form shows 'Lokality (lze vybrat více)' checkbox multi-select when locations exist (15 Czech regions shown), (9) NewsPage.js fetches from /api/news-categories on mount (overrides hardcoded fallback), (10) NearbyPage.js fetches from /api/locations on mount. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration25.py
